title: TC001-Login and Navigate to Program Builder
description: Verifies trainer can log in and access the Program Builder page
code:
import asyncio
from playwright import async_api

async def run_test():
    pw = None
    browser = None
    context = None

    try:
        # Start a Playwright session in asynchronous mode
        pw = await async_api.async_playwright().start()

        # Launch a Chromium browser in headless mode with custom arguments
        browser = await pw.chromium.launch(
            headless=True,
            args=[
                "--window-size=1280,720",         # Set the browser window size
                "--disable-dev-shm-usage",        # Avoid using /dev/shm which can cause issues in containers
                "--ipc=host",                     # Use host-level IPC for better stability
                "--single-process"                # Run the browser in a single process mode
            ],
        )

        # Create a new browser context (like an incognito window)
        context = await browser.new_context()
        context.set_default_timeout(5000)

        # Open a new page in the browser context
        page = await context.new_page()

        # Navigate to your target URL and wait until the network request is committed
        await page.goto("http://localhost:3000/trainer/programs", wait_until="commit", timeout=10000)

        # Wait for the main page to reach DOMContentLoaded state (optional for stability)
        try:
            await page.wait_for_load_state("domcontentloaded", timeout=3000)
        except async_api.Error:
            pass

        # Iterate through all iframes and wait for them to load as well
        for frame in page.frames:
            try:
                await frame.wait_for_load_state("domcontentloaded", timeout=3000)
            except async_api.Error:
                pass

        # Interact with the page elements to simulate user flow
        # -> Navigate to http://localhost:3000/trainer/programs
        await page.goto("http://localhost:3000/trainer/programs", wait_until="commit", timeout=10000)
        
        # -> Load the application login page so the SPA can initialize (navigate to http://localhost:3000) and then proceed with the login steps.
        await page.goto("http://localhost:3000", wait_until="commit", timeout=10000)
        
        # -> Type the provided email and password into the inputs and click the login button to submit the form.
        frame = context.pages[-1]
        # Input text
        elem = frame.locator('xpath=html/body/div/div/div/div[2]/div/form/input[1]').nth(0)
        await page.wait_for_timeout(3000); await elem.fill('test@gmail.com')
        
        frame = context.pages[-1]
        # Input text
        elem = frame.locator('xpath=html/body/div/div/div/div[2]/div/form/input[2]').nth(0)
        await page.wait_for_timeout(3000); await elem.fill('292546')
        
        frame = context.pages[-1]
        # Click element
        elem = frame.locator('xpath=html/body/div/div/div/div[2]/div/form/button').nth(0)
        await page.wait_for_timeout(3000); await elem.click(timeout=5000)
        
        # -> Click the 'โปรแกรม' (Programs) link in the sidebar to open the Program Builder page (use element index 332).
        frame = context.pages[-1]
        # Click element
        elem = frame.locator('xpath=html/body/div/div/div/aside/div/div[2]/div[4]/a').nth(0)
        await page.wait_for_timeout(3000); await elem.click(timeout=5000)
        
        # --> Assertions to verify final state
        frame = context.pages[-1]
        frame = context.pages[-1]
        assert '/trainer/programs' in frame.url, f"URL does not contain '/trainer/programs': {frame.url}"
        # Verify program list or empty state is visible by checking for known Thai UI texts
        candidates = ['โปรแกรมการออกกำลังกาย', 'สร้างโปรแกรม', 'ทั้งหมด', 'ผู้ใช้ 0']
        found = False
        for text in candidates:
            try:
                el = frame.locator(f"text={text}").first
                if await el.is_visible():
                    found = True
                    break
            except Exception:
                pass
        assert found, 'Program list or empty state not found: none of the expected texts are visible.'
        await asyncio.sleep(5)

    finally:
        if context:
            await context.close()
        if browser:
            await browser.close()
        if pw:
            await pw.stop()

asyncio.run(run_test())

title: TC002-Create New Program Template
description: Verifies trainer can create a new program template
code:
import asyncio
from playwright import async_api

async def run_test():
    pw = None
    browser = None
    context = None

    try:
        # Start a Playwright session in asynchronous mode
        pw = await async_api.async_playwright().start()

        # Launch a Chromium browser in headless mode with custom arguments
        browser = await pw.chromium.launch(
            headless=True,
            args=[
                "--window-size=1280,720",         # Set the browser window size
                "--disable-dev-shm-usage",        # Avoid using /dev/shm which can cause issues in containers
                "--ipc=host",                     # Use host-level IPC for better stability
                "--single-process"                # Run the browser in a single process mode
            ],
        )

        # Create a new browser context (like an incognito window)
        context = await browser.new_context()
        context.set_default_timeout(5000)

        # Open a new page in the browser context
        page = await context.new_page()

        # Navigate to your target URL and wait until the network request is committed
        await page.goto("http://localhost:3000/trainer/programs", wait_until="commit", timeout=10000)

        # Wait for the main page to reach DOMContentLoaded state (optional for stability)
        try:
            await page.wait_for_load_state("domcontentloaded", timeout=3000)
        except async_api.Error:
            pass

        # Iterate through all iframes and wait for them to load as well
        for frame in page.frames:
            try:
                await frame.wait_for_load_state("domcontentloaded", timeout=3000)
            except async_api.Error:
                pass

        # Interact with the page elements to simulate user flow
        # -> Navigate to http://localhost:3000/trainer/programs
        await page.goto("http://localhost:3000/trainer/programs", wait_until="commit", timeout=10000)
        
        # -> Fill email and password fields on the sign-in page and click the login button (เข้าสู่ระบบ). Then wait for the trainer programs page to load.
        frame = context.pages[-1]
        # Input text
        elem = frame.locator('xpath=html/body/div/div/div/div[2]/div/form/input[1]').nth(0)
        await page.wait_for_timeout(3000); await elem.fill('test@gmail.com')
        
        frame = context.pages[-1]
        # Input text
        elem = frame.locator('xpath=html/body/div/div/div/div[2]/div/form/input[2]').nth(0)
        await page.wait_for_timeout(3000); await elem.fill('292546')
        
        frame = context.pages[-1]
        # Click element
        elem = frame.locator('xpath=html/body/div/div/div/div[2]/div/form/button').nth(0)
        await page.wait_for_timeout(3000); await elem.click(timeout=5000)
        
        # -> Click the 'โปรแกรม' sidebar link to open the Programs page.
        frame = context.pages[-1]
        # Click element
        elem = frame.locator('xpath=html/body/div/div/div/aside/div/div[2]/div[4]/a').nth(0)
        await page.wait_for_timeout(3000); await elem.click(timeout=5000)
        
        # -> Click the 'สร้างโปรแกรม' button to open the Create Program modal (index 390).
        frame = context.pages[-1]
        # Click element
        elem = frame.locator('xpath=html/body/div[1]/div/div/div/main/div/div/div[1]/div[2]/button[2]').nth(0)
        await page.wait_for_timeout(3000); await elem.click(timeout=5000)
        
        # -> Type 'TestSprite Test Program' into program name field (index 462), type 'Auto-generated test program' into description (index 465), then click the สร้าง button (index 473). After click, verify success by checking for a success toast or the new program appearing in the list.
        frame = context.pages[-1]
        # Input text
        elem = frame.locator('xpath=html/body/div[4]/div[2]/div[1]/input').nth(0)
        await page.wait_for_timeout(3000); await elem.fill('TestSprite Test Program')
        
        frame = context.pages[-1]
        # Input text
        elem = frame.locator('xpath=html/body/div[4]/div[2]/div[2]/textarea').nth(0)
        await page.wait_for_timeout(3000); await elem.fill('Auto-generated test program')
        
        frame = context.pages[-1]
        # Click element
        elem = frame.locator('xpath=html/body/div[4]/div[3]/button').nth(0)
        await page.wait_for_timeout(3000); await elem.click(timeout=5000)
        
        # -> Click the 'สร้างโปรแกรม' button to reopen the Create Program modal so name/description can be entered and the create action retried.
        frame = context.pages[-1]
        # Click element
        elem = frame.locator('xpath=html/body/div/div/div/div/main/div/div/div[1]/div[2]/button[2]').nth(0)
        await page.wait_for_timeout(3000); await elem.click(timeout=5000)
        
        # -> Type 'TestSprite Test Program' into program name field (index 759), type 'Auto-generated test program' into description (index 762), then click the สร้าง (create) button (index 770).
        frame = context.pages[-1]
        # Input text
        elem = frame.locator('xpath=html/body/div[4]/div[2]/div[1]/input').nth(0)
        await page.wait_for_timeout(3000); await elem.fill('TestSprite Test Program')
        
        frame = context.pages[-1]
        # Input text
        elem = frame.locator('xpath=html/body/div[4]/div[2]/div[2]/textarea').nth(0)
        await page.wait_for_timeout(3000); await elem.fill('Auto-generated test program')
        
        frame = context.pages[-1]
        # Click element
        elem = frame.locator('xpath=html/body/div[4]/div[3]/button').nth(0)
        await page.wait_for_timeout(3000); await elem.click(timeout=5000)
        
        # -> Close the modal, wait briefly, then check the page content for the new program 'TestSprite Test Program' or a success toast message to verify creation.
        frame = context.pages[-1]
        # Click element
        elem = frame.locator('xpath=html/body/div[3]/button').nth(0)
        await page.wait_for_timeout(3000); await elem.click(timeout=5000)
        
        # --> Assertions to verify final state
        frame = context.pages[-1]
        # -> Assertions: verify the newly created program and its description appear on the page
        await page.wait_for_selector('text=TestSprite Test Program', timeout=5000)
        program_locator = page.locator('text=TestSprite Test Program').first
        assert await program_locator.is_visible(), 'Program name "TestSprite Test Program" not visible after creation'
        await page.wait_for_selector('text=Auto-generated test program', timeout=5000)
        desc_locator = page.locator('text=Auto-generated test program').first
        assert await desc_locator.is_visible(), 'Program description "Auto-generated test program" not visible after creation'
        await asyncio.sleep(5)

    finally:
        if context:
            await context.close()
        if browser:
            await browser.close()
        if pw:
            await pw.stop()

asyncio.run(run_test())
testError:
### Analysis of the Task Goal, Last Action, and Error

1. **Task Goal**: The objective is to verify that a trainer can create a new program template by filling in the program name and description, and then clicking the 'สร้าง' button to submit the form.

2. **Last Action**: The last action attempted was to fill in the program name field with 'TestSprite Test Program'. This action failed due to a timeout error while trying to locate the input field.

3. **Error**: The error message indicates that the locator for the program name input field could not be found within the specified timeout period (30 seconds). This suggests that the element may not be present in the DOM at the time the script attempted to interact with it.

### Explanation of What Went Wrong
The error occurred because the script was unable to locate the input field for the program name using the provided XPath. This could be due to several reasons:
- **Element Not Loaded**: The input field may not have been rendered on the page yet when the script attempted to access it. This can happen if there are delays in loading the page or if the input field is dynamically generated after some user interaction.
- **Incorrect XPath**: The XPath used to locate the input field might be incorrect or too specific, leading to failure in finding the element.
- **Visibility Issues**: The input field might be hidden or disabled, preventing interaction.

### Next Steps
To resolve this issue, consider the following actions:
- **Increase Timeout**: If the page is slow to load, increasing the timeout duration may help.
- **Check XPath**: Verify that the XPath used is correct and points to the right element. You can use browser developer tools to test the XPath.
- **Wait for Element**: Implement a wait mechanism to ensure the element is present and visible before attempting to fill it. This can be done using explicit waits or checking for visibility.

By addressing these points, you should be able to successfully fill in the program name and proceed with the task.

title: TC003-View Program Details
description: Verifies trainer can view the details of an existing program
code:
import asyncio
from playwright import async_api

async def run_test():
    pw = None
    browser = None
    context = None

    try:
        # Start a Playwright session in asynchronous mode
        pw = await async_api.async_playwright().start()

        # Launch a Chromium browser in headless mode with custom arguments
        browser = await pw.chromium.launch(
            headless=True,
            args=[
                "--window-size=1280,720",         # Set the browser window size
                "--disable-dev-shm-usage",        # Avoid using /dev/shm which can cause issues in containers
                "--ipc=host",                     # Use host-level IPC for better stability
                "--single-process"                # Run the browser in a single process mode
            ],
        )

        # Create a new browser context (like an incognito window)
        context = await browser.new_context()
        context.set_default_timeout(5000)

        # Open a new page in the browser context
        page = await context.new_page()

        # Navigate to your target URL and wait until the network request is committed
        await page.goto("http://localhost:3000/trainer/programs", wait_until="commit", timeout=10000)

        # Wait for the main page to reach DOMContentLoaded state (optional for stability)
        try:
            await page.wait_for_load_state("domcontentloaded", timeout=3000)
        except async_api.Error:
            pass

        # Iterate through all iframes and wait for them to load as well
        for frame in page.frames:
            try:
                await frame.wait_for_load_state("domcontentloaded", timeout=3000)
            except async_api.Error:
                pass

        # Interact with the page elements to simulate user flow
        # -> Navigate to http://localhost:3000/trainer/programs
        await page.goto("http://localhost:3000/trainer/programs", wait_until="commit", timeout=10000)
        
        # -> Log in with test credentials to reach the trainer programs page (fill email, fill password, click 'เข้าสู่ระบบ').
        frame = context.pages[-1]
        # Input text
        elem = frame.locator('xpath=html/body/div/div/div/div[2]/div/form/input[1]').nth(0)
        await page.wait_for_timeout(3000); await elem.fill('test@gmail.com')
        
        frame = context.pages[-1]
        # Input text
        elem = frame.locator('xpath=html/body/div/div/div/div[2]/div/form/input[2]').nth(0)
        await page.wait_for_timeout(3000); await elem.fill('292546')
        
        frame = context.pages[-1]
        # Click element
        elem = frame.locator('xpath=html/body/div/div/div/div[2]/div/form/button').nth(0)
        await page.wait_for_timeout(3000); await elem.click(timeout=5000)
        
        # -> Click the 'โปรแกรม' sidebar link (index 244) to navigate to the programs list, then re-scan for program cards.
        frame = context.pages[-1]
        # Click element
        elem = frame.locator('xpath=html/body/div/div/div/aside/div/div[2]/div[4]/a').nth(0)
        await page.wait_for_timeout(3000); await elem.click(timeout=5000)
        
        # -> Click the 'Template' tab (index 398) to check for template programs; if that shows programs, click the first program card. If none appear, click the 'ปรับแต่ง' tab (index 399) next.
        frame = context.pages[-1]
        # Click element
        elem = frame.locator('xpath=html/body/div[1]/div/div/div/main/div/div/div[2]/div[2]/div/button[2]').nth(0)
        await page.wait_for_timeout(3000); await elem.click(timeout=5000)
        
        # -> Click the first program card in the Template list to open program details (open program card at index 444).
        frame = context.pages[-1]
        # Click element
        elem = frame.locator('xpath=html/body/div/div/div/div/main/div/div/div[3]/div').nth(0)
        await page.wait_for_timeout(3000); await elem.click(timeout=5000)
        
        # -> Click the first program card in the Template list to open its details (use fresh index 701). After the page updates, re-scan for program name and week/day structure.
        frame = context.pages[-1]
        # Click element
        elem = frame.locator('xpath=html/body/div/div/div/div/main/div/div/div[3]/div/div[1]').nth(0)
        await page.wait_for_timeout(3000); await elem.click(timeout=5000)
        
        # --> Assertions to verify final state
        frame = context.pages[-1]
        from playwright.async_api import expect
        
        # --- Assertions: verify program details view ---
        # Verify there is a heading that can serve as the program name and that it is not empty
        heading = frame.locator("main h1, main h2, main h3").nth(0)
        await expect(heading).to_be_visible(timeout=5000)
        heading_text = (await heading.inner_text()).strip()
        assert heading_text, f"Expected a non-empty program name heading, got: '{heading_text}'","
        # Verify week and day structure is visible
        await expect(frame.locator("text=สัปดาห์ที่ 1")).to_be_visible(timeout=5000)
        await expect(frame.locator("text=ตารางฝึกซ้อม")).to_be_visible(timeout=5000)
        await expect(frame.locator("text=Day 1")).to_be_visible(timeout=5000)
        await expect(frame.locator("text=Day 7")).to_be_visible(timeout=5000)
        # Verify day detail area and control to add sections is present
        await expect(frame.locator("text=รายละเอียด Day")).to_be_visible(timeout=5000)
        await expect(frame.locator("text=เพิ่ม Section")).to_be_visible(timeout=5000)
        await asyncio.sleep(5)

    finally:
        if context:
            await context.close()
        if browser:
            await browser.close()
        if pw:
            await pw.stop()

asyncio.run(run_test())

title: TC004-Add Section to Program Day
description: Verifies trainer can add a section (warmup, main, cooldown) to a program day
code:
import asyncio
from playwright import async_api

async def run_test():
    pw = None
    browser = None
    context = None

    try:
        # Start a Playwright session in asynchronous mode
        pw = await async_api.async_playwright().start()

        # Launch a Chromium browser in headless mode with custom arguments
        browser = await pw.chromium.launch(
            headless=True,
            args=[
                "--window-size=1280,720",         # Set the browser window size
                "--disable-dev-shm-usage",        # Avoid using /dev/shm which can cause issues in containers
                "--ipc=host",                     # Use host-level IPC for better stability
                "--single-process"                # Run the browser in a single process mode
            ],
        )

        # Create a new browser context (like an incognito window)
        context = await browser.new_context()
        context.set_default_timeout(5000)

        # Open a new page in the browser context
        page = await context.new_page()

        # Navigate to your target URL and wait until the network request is committed
        await page.goto("http://localhost:3000/trainer/programs", wait_until="commit", timeout=10000)

        # Wait for the main page to reach DOMContentLoaded state (optional for stability)
        try:
            await page.wait_for_load_state("domcontentloaded", timeout=3000)
        except async_api.Error:
            pass

        # Iterate through all iframes and wait for them to load as well
        for frame in page.frames:
            try:
                await frame.wait_for_load_state("domcontentloaded", timeout=3000)
            except async_api.Error:
                pass

        # Interact with the page elements to simulate user flow
        # -> Navigate to http://localhost:3000/trainer/programs
        await page.goto("http://localhost:3000/trainer/programs", wait_until="commit", timeout=10000)
        
        # -> Fill the email field with test@gmail.com, fill the password field with 292546, then click the sign-in button (index 142) to authenticate.
        frame = context.pages[-1]
        # Input text
        elem = frame.locator('xpath=html/body/div/div/div/div[2]/div/form/input[1]').nth(0)
        await page.wait_for_timeout(3000); await elem.fill('test@gmail.com')
        
        frame = context.pages[-1]
        # Input text
        elem = frame.locator('xpath=html/body/div/div/div/div[2]/div/form/input[2]').nth(0)
        await page.wait_for_timeout(3000); await elem.fill('292546')
        
        frame = context.pages[-1]
        # Click element
        elem = frame.locator('xpath=html/body/div/div/div/div[2]/div/form/button').nth(0)
        await page.wait_for_timeout(3000); await elem.click(timeout=5000)
        
        # -> Click the 'โปรแกรม' sidebar link to open the Programs page and then locate the first program.
        frame = context.pages[-1]
        # Click element
        elem = frame.locator('xpath=html/body/div/div/div/aside/div/div[2]/div[4]/a').nth(0)
        await page.wait_for_timeout(3000); await elem.click(timeout=5000)
        
        # -> Click the 'โปรแกรม' sidebar link (index 433) to open the Programs page.
        frame = context.pages[-1]
        # Click element
        elem = frame.locator('xpath=html/body/div/div/div/aside/div/div[2]/div[4]/a').nth(0)
        await page.wait_for_timeout(3000); await elem.click(timeout=5000)
        
        # -> Click the 'สร้างโปรแกรม' (Create Program) button to create a new program so a section can be added.
        frame = context.pages[-1]
        # Click element
        elem = frame.locator('xpath=html/body/div[1]/div/div/div/main/div/div/div[1]/div[2]/button[2]').nth(0)
        await page.wait_for_timeout(3000); await elem.click(timeout=5000)
        
        # -> Enter a program name into the name input (index 653) and click the 'สร้าง' (Create) button (index 664) to create a program so a section can be added.
        frame = context.pages[-1]
        # Input text
        elem = frame.locator('xpath=html/body/div[4]/div[2]/div[1]/input').nth(0)
        await page.wait_for_timeout(3000); await elem.fill('Auto Test Program')
        
        frame = context.pages[-1]
        # Click element
        elem = frame.locator('xpath=html/body/div[4]/div[3]/button').nth(0)
        await page.wait_for_timeout(3000); await elem.click(timeout=5000)
        
        # -> Click the Create ('สร้าง') button in the program modal (index 664) and wait for the app to process and render the updated programs list, then open the newly created program.
        frame = context.pages[-1]
        # Click element
        elem = frame.locator('xpath=html/body/div[3]/div[3]/button').nth(0)
        await page.wait_for_timeout(3000); await elem.click(timeout=5000)
        
        # -> Open the Create Program modal by clicking the 'สร้างโปรแกรม' button (index 938), then wait for the modal to render so the program name input can be filled.
        frame = context.pages[-1]
        # Click element
        elem = frame.locator('xpath=html/body/div/div/div/div/main/div/div/div[1]/div[2]/button[2]').nth(0)
        await page.wait_for_timeout(3000); await elem.click(timeout=5000)
        
        # -> Fill the program name with 'Auto Test Program' into input (index 1115) and click the Create ('สร้าง') button (index 1126) to create the program, then wait for the programs list to update.
        frame = context.pages[-1]
        # Input text
        elem = frame.locator('xpath=html/body/div[3]/div[2]/div[1]/input').nth(0)
        await page.wait_for_timeout(3000); await elem.fill('Auto Test Program')
        
        frame = context.pages[-1]
        # Click element
        elem = frame.locator('xpath=html/body/div[3]/div[3]/button').nth(0)
        await page.wait_for_timeout(3000); await elem.click(timeout=5000)
        
        # -> Click the Create ('สร้าง') button in the modal (fresh index 1126) to submit program creation, then wait for the app to process and update the programs list.
        frame = context.pages[-1]
        # Click element
        elem = frame.locator('xpath=html/body/div[3]/div[3]/button').nth(0)
        await page.wait_for_timeout(3000); await elem.click(timeout=5000)
        
        # -> Click the 'เพิ่มสัปดาห์ใหม่' (Add new week) button to create a week in the program schedule so sections can be added.
        frame = context.pages[-1]
        # Click element
        elem = frame.locator('xpath=html/body/div/div/div/div/main/div/div/div[3]/div[2]/button').nth(0)
        await page.wait_for_timeout(3000); await elem.click(timeout=5000)
        
        # -> Click the first program card to open its details so sections can be added (target element index 1495).
        frame = context.pages[-1]
        # Click element
        elem = frame.locator('xpath=html/body/div/div/div/div/main/div/div/div[3]/div[1]/div[1]/div').nth(0)
        await page.wait_for_timeout(3000); await elem.click(timeout=5000)
        
        # -> Click the 'เพิ่ม Section' (Add Section) control for the first day to open the section creation modal.

However, the last action of filling in the program name input field failed due to a timeout error. Specifically, the error message indicates that the locator for the input field could not be found within the specified timeout period of 30 seconds. This suggests that the page may not have fully loaded or the input field was not available at the time the action was attempted. 

To resolve this issue, ensure that the page has completely loaded before attempting to interact with the input field. You may also want to check if the XPath used to locate the input field is correct and if the element is visible and enabled for interaction. Additionally, consider increasing the timeout duration or implementing a wait condition to ensure the element is present before attempting to fill it.

title: TC005-Add Exercise to Section
description: Verifies trainer can add an exercise to a section with tracking fields
code:
import asyncio
from playwright import async_api
from playwright.async_api import expect

async def run_test():
    pw = None
    browser = None
    context = None

    try:
        # Start a Playwright session in asynchronous mode
        pw = await async_api.async_playwright().start()

        # Launch a Chromium browser in headless mode with custom arguments
        browser = await pw.chromium.launch(
            headless=True,
            args=[
                "--window-size=1280,720",         # Set the browser window size
                "--disable-dev-shm-usage",        # Avoid using /dev/shm which can cause issues in containers
                "--ipc=host",                     # Use host-level IPC for better stability
                "--single-process"                # Run the browser in a single process mode
            ],
        )

        # Create a new browser context (like an incognito window)
        context = await browser.new_context()
        context.set_default_timeout(5000)

        # Open a new page in the browser context
        page = await context.new_page()

        # Navigate to your target URL and wait until the network request is committed
        await page.goto("http://localhost:3000/trainer/programs", wait_until="commit", timeout=10000)

        # Wait for the main page to reach DOMContentLoaded state (optional for stability)
        try:
            await page.wait_for_load_state("domcontentloaded", timeout=3000)
        except async_api.Error:
            pass

        # Iterate through all iframes and wait for them to load as well
        for frame in page.frames:
            try:
                await frame.wait_for_load_state("domcontentloaded", timeout=3000)
            except async_api.Error:
                pass

        # Interact with the page elements to simulate user flow
 
        # -> Input email and password, then click login button.
        frame = context.pages[-1]
        elem = frame.locator('xpath=html/body/div/div/div/div[2]/div/form/input').nth(0)
        await page.wait_for_timeout(3000); await elem.fill('test@gmail.com')
        

        frame = context.pages[-1]
        elem = frame.locator('xpath=html/body/div/div/div/div[2]/div/form/input[2]').nth(0)
        await page.wait_for_timeout(3000); await elem.fill('292546')
        

        frame = context.pages[-1]
        elem = frame.locator('xpath=html/body/div/div/div/div[2]/div/form/button').nth(0)
        await page.wait_for_timeout(3000); await elem.click(timeout=5000)
        

        # -> Click on 'โปรแกรม' (Programs) link to navigate to programs page.
        frame = context.pages[-1]
        elem = frame.locator('xpath=html/body/div/div/div/aside/div/div[2]/div[4]/a').nth(0)
        await page.wait_for_timeout(3000); await elem.click(timeout=5000)
        

        # -> Click on the first program card to view its details.
        frame = context.pages[-1]
        elem = frame.locator('xpath=html/body/div/div/div/div/main/div/div/div[3]/div/div/div/button').nth(0)
        await page.wait_for_timeout(3000); await elem.click(timeout=5000)
        

        # -> Try clicking on the first program card container or another visible clickable element to open program details.
        frame = context.pages[-1]
        elem = frame.locator('xpath=html/body/div/div/div/div/main/div/div/div[3]/div').nth(0)
        await page.wait_for_timeout(3000); await elem.click(timeout=5000)
        

        # -> Click the button to add a section to Day 1.
        frame = context.pages[-1]
        elem = frame.locator('xpath=html/body/div/div/div/div/main/div/div/div[3]/div/div[2]/div[2]/div/div[2]/button').nth(0)
        await page.wait_for_timeout(3000); await elem.click(timeout=5000)
        

        # -> Click the button to add an exercise to the section after saving the section.
        frame = context.pages[-1]
        elem = frame.locator('xpath=html/body/div[3]/div[2]/div[3]/input').nth(0)
        await page.wait_for_timeout(3000); await elem.fill('Chest & Triceps')
        

        frame = context.pages[-1]
        elem = frame.locator('xpath=html/body/div[3]/div[3]/button[2]').nth(0)
        await page.wait_for_timeout(3000); await elem.click(timeout=5000)
        

        # -> Click on the first program card to navigate to the program details page.
        frame = context.pages[-1]
        elem = frame.locator('xpath=html/body/div/div/div/div/main/div/div/div[3]/div').nth(0)
        await page.wait_for_timeout(3000); await elem.click(timeout=5000)
        

        # -> Click the expand button (index 35) to expand the 'Chest & Triceps' section.
        frame = context.pages[-1]
        elem = frame.locator('xpath=html/body/div/div/div/div/main/div/div/div[3]/div/div[2]/div[2]/div[2]/div/div/button').nth(0)
        await page.wait_for_timeout(3000); await elem.click(timeout=5000)
        

        # --> Assertions to verify final state
        frame = context.pages[-1]
        try:
            await expect(frame.locator('text=Exercise Added Successfully').first).to_be_visible(timeout=1000)
        except AssertionError:
            raise AssertionError("Test case failed: The test plan execution failed to verify that the trainer can add an exercise to a section with tracking fields. The expected confirmation text 'Exercise Added Successfully' was not found on the page.")
        await asyncio.sleep(5)

    finally:
        if context:
            await context.close()
        if browser:
            await browser.close()
        if pw:
            await pw.stop()

asyncio.run(run_test())
